# Decision Log

> Architectural and design decisions made during the project.
> Append new entries at the bottom. Do not edit or remove past decisions — if a decision is reversed, add a new entry that supersedes it.

## Format

```
- **[YYYY-MM-DD] Title**: Decision. Reason. [Supersedes: YYYY-MM-DD Title, if applicable]
```

## Decisions

- **[YYYY-MM-DD] Example decision**: We chose PostgreSQL over MongoDB because our data is relational and we need strong consistency guarantees.
